description: Email that mentions a collaboration but no budget figure
raw_text:
Hi there,

My name is Lisa and I work at GlowLab Cosmetics. We're planning a YouTube campaign for our new serum line and would love to feature you.

We're looking for a 10-minute dedicated review video on YouTube. We'd need it published within 2 weeks.

Could you send us your media kit and rates? We'll review and come back with a proposal.

Best,
Lisa Park
Influencer Relations, GlowLab Cosmetics
